hero.title: A Sales Army In A Single AI Agent
hero.subtitle: Your artificial intelligence agent integrates with your platforms, answers customer inquiries, qualifies leads, and schedules appointments — all automatically, 24 hours a day.

chat.name: Sofia - Your AI Assistant
chat.bubble1: Hi! I'm Sofia, your sales assistant. How can I help you today?
chat.bubble2: I'm looking for a 3-bedroom house in the golden zone
chat.bubble3: Excellent choice! I have 4 available properties in that area. Would you like to schedule a visit or receive the details via WhatsApp?
chat.bubble4: Yes, send me the details on WhatsApp
chat.bubble5: Perfect! I'll send you the information right now. Can you share your number?

features.title: Why Is PropelAgent Different?
features.subtitle: It's not just a chatbot. It's your best salesperson working non-stop.

install.title: Instant Installation
install.description: Copy one line of code and your agent will be active on your website in less than 30 seconds.

leads.title: Smart Lead Qualification
leads.description: Your agent identifies the most qualified prospects and automatically prioritizes them for your team.

calendar.title: Automatic Appointment Scheduling
calendar.description: Connect your calendar and your agent schedules visits directly with your potential clients.

always.title: Works 24/7/365
always.description: Your agent never rests. It answers questions, captures leads, and closes sales at any hour.

channels.title: WhatsApp + Web + Social
channels.description: A single agent that responds on your website, WhatsApp Business, Messenger, and Instagram.

dashboard.title: Dashboard with Insights
dashboard.description: Real-time metrics on conversations, captured leads, and your agent's performance.

security.title: Your Data Safer Than a Bank
security.subtitle: Enterprise-level protection for your information and your clients'.

encryption.title: AES-256 Encryption
encryption.description: All data is encrypted in transit and at rest with the same standard used by banks.

validation.title: Subscriber Validation
validation.description: Every user goes through identity verification before accessing sensitive data.

audit.title: Audit Trail
audit.description: Every action is logged to maintain complete transparency and traceability.

zeroAccess.title: Zero Human Access
zeroAccess.description: Your data is never seen by people. All processing is automatic and secure.

soc.title: SOC 2 Type II
soc.description: Independent audit of security and privacy controls

pricing.title: Choose Your Plan and Start Today
pricing.subtitle: No long-term contracts. Cancel anytime.

cta.title: Ready to Sell More Without Working More?
